{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Spyglass (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The Spyglass is an item used to help find the Gate.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
